extension.description: Orion v3.6.1 - Complete media addon with Netflix-style interface. BIG portrait poster cards in grid view, no name banners, cyan (#00D4FF) color scheme. Netflix-style season dropdown and episode grid for TV shows. SEASONS button on TV show detail. Netflix-style search. Master skin toggle in Settings. Multiple torrent scrapers, Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Trakt integration.
extension.news: [3.6.1] BIG portrait poster grid cards, SEASONS button for TV shows with season dropdown and episode grid, improved scroll to page navigation. [3.6.0] Landscape thumbnails, Netflix search, skin toggle.
